title: dactylis polygama var. pilosa
intro: Dactylis polygama var. pilosa, also known as meadow grass or wild orchard grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dactylis polygama var. pilosa include relief from digestive issues, such as diarrhea and nausea, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation in the respiratory and urinary systems. The plant can be prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of Europe.
